faqs.question: Why are flies such a problem in Great Kills?
faqs.answer: Great Kills' waterfront location near the harbor and park, combined with numerous restaurants and food establishments along Amboy Road, creates prime breeding conditions for flies. Moisture from the coastal environment and organic waste sources attract multiple fly species year-round.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide fly control service in Great Kills?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Great Kills residents and businesses. Our team can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to assess the situation and begin treatment, with most fly infestations showing significant reduction within 48 hours.

faqs.answer: Our comprehensive fly control service includes a thorough inspection, identification of breeding sites, targeted treatment using professional-grade products, sanitation recommendations, entry point sealing, and a follow-up visit to ensure complete elimination. Price varies based on property size and infestation severity.
